name: Scheduled Task Creation Detected
description: The use of `schtasks.exe` for the creation of scheduled tasks in a user session is detected. Attackers often abuse scheduled tasks for persistence, privilege escalation, or defense evasion. This alert specifically focuses on tasks created by non-system users, which can indicate malicious activity.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the creation of a new scheduled task on host `{hostname}` at `{timestamp}`. The command line used was `{command_line}`. Identify the user (`{user_name}`) who created the task and the program or script (`{task_program}`) it is configured to run. Determine if this is a legitimate administrative action or a malicious attempt to establish persistence. Provide a summary of your findings and recommend steps to remove the suspicious task and contain the threat.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the scheduled task was created.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The time the task was created.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the schtasks.exe process.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user account that created the scheduled task.

parameters.name: task_program
parameters.description: The program or script the scheduled task is configured to run.
